input: Create the documentation in Markdown for both frontend, backend and infrastructure of a fullstack app that has a button that calls an API which returns a greeting message.
expected_output:
# Fullstack App Documentation

## Overview
This application consists of a frontend, backend, and infrastructure setup that allows users to click a button on a webpage, which triggers an API call to return a greeting message.

## Frontend
The frontend is a simple HTML file that contains a button. When the button is clicked, it sends a POST request to the backend API endpoint `/greet` with a JSON payload containing the name.

### HTML Code
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>Hello World</title>
</head>
<body>
    <button onclick="fetch('/greet', {method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({name: 'World'})})">Hello World</button>
</body>
</html>
```

## Backend
The backend is built using FastAPI. It has a single POST endpoint `/greet` that accepts a JSON payload with a `name` field and returns a greeting message.

### FastAPI Code
```python
from fastapi import FastAPI, Request

app = FastAPI()
